research_directions.direction: Training data augmentation via real human conversation feedback
research_directions.rationale: Real data has higher diversity and exposes failures synthetic data misses

research_directions.direction: Building human-aligned reward models for personalization
research_directions.rationale: Current LLM judges over-inflate scores; learned RMs only ~0.3 Spearman

research_directions.direction: Implicit personalization (attribute integration without explicit mention)
research_directions.rationale: Explicit attribute mentions are over-rewarded by LLM judges but not by humans

research_directions.direction: Cross-task attribute relevance models for Agent personalization
research_directions.rationale: Agent needs to know which user attributes matter for which task context

research_directions.direction: Overgeneralization detection and correction in Agent attribute extraction
research_directions.rationale: 53.9% of extraction errors are overgeneralization — directly affects Agent assuming user preferences
